content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — push entitlement (`DealAlerts.entitlements:6-7`) paired with a hard-coded hourly repeating alert (`NotificationScheduler.swift:8-14`) and metadata promising "alert you EVERY HOUR ... unlimited notifications, all day long" (`description.txt:3`) may trigger 4.5.4 review questions about spam/promotional push.
Pierre: Apple's 4.5.4 requires push to be user-permissioned and not used for unsolicited advertising or spam; a fixed every-hour promotional deal blast fits that pattern. I found a `UNTimeIntervalNotificationTrigger` repeating every 3600s with promotional copy, mirrored by metadata explicitly promising hourly unlimited alerts. Consider making the cadence user-configurable and reframing the marketing text to avoid "every hour / unlimited" spam-push language.
